name: Merge Solitaire
author: Poki
description: Merge Solitaire is a merge game that blends the fun of solitaire with number-matching strategy! Combine two cards of the same value to merge and double them, starting from 2 and working your way up. Chain multiple merges for bonus cash, then use it to unlock powerful tools: destroy unwanted cards or double a card’s value! Want a real challenge? Try beating the game with no bonuses at all. Ready to stack, merge, and win? How to play Merge Solitaire? Click and hold to move cards. Who created Merge Solitaire? Merge Solitaire is created by Adgard. Play their other skill and arcade games on Poki: Merge and Double , Freecell Solitaire , Merge Mosaics , Pop It vs Spinner , Find The Candy , MadZOOng , Merge to Million , Shenzhen Mahjong , Mahjoctopus , and One Hundred Castles Solitaire ! How can I play Merge Solitaire for free? You can play Merge Solitaire for free on Poki. Can I play Merge Solitaire on mobile devices and desktop? Merge Solitaire can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
